work.title: SEO & Content Strategy
meta: Search Intent · Keyword Strategy · Content Architecture
work.summary: Built and executed a full-scale SEO content strategy for a household cleaning product brand, handling everything from keyword research and search intent mapping to content planning, blog development, publishing, and optimization. My work focused on creating organized, search-driven content ecosystems designed to improve visibility, strengthen topical authority, and actually answer the questions people were searching for.
work.caption: A behind-the-scenes look at the content planning process: keyword clustering, search intent mapping, metadata planning, and blog organization for a household cleaning product brand.

work.title: Project Management & Traffic Coordination
meta: Campaign Planning · Workflow Systems · Email Marketing
work.summary: Built and managed the project workflows behind a multi-channel nonprofit event campaign, developing systems to keep timelines, creative assets, email marketing, and cross-department collaboration organized from kickoff to launch. The work required balancing campaign logistics, stakeholder communication, shifting priorities, and day-to-day coordination across multiple teams and moving pieces.
work.caption: Campaign workflow management in action, including timeline tracking, approvals, email scheduling, and keeping a lot of moving pieces from catching on fire.

work.title: Analytics & Performance Reporting
meta: Audience Insights · KPI Reporting · Traffic Analysis
work.summary: Created monthly reporting dashboards to track website traffic, campaign performance, audience behavior, and conversion trends across marketing channels. Beyond just pulling numbers, I used analytics data to figure out what was working, where audiences were coming from, and how future campaigns and content strategies could perform better.
work.caption: Custom reporting dashboard used to track KPIs, audience engagement, traffic sources, and the bigger story hiding behind the numbers.

work.title: Editorial & Content Development
meta: Long-Form Writing · Digital Storytelling · SEO Copywriting
work.summary: Written content across travel, lifestyle, legal, healthcare, real estate, and tech industries, ranging from branded copy and editorial features to long-form digital storytelling. My work focuses on adapting tone, voice, and structure to fit different audiences and platforms while creating content that feels engaging, human, and intentionally crafted.
work.caption: Published editorial work combining digital storytelling, audience engagement, and SEO-aware content structure across a range of industries and platforms.

work.title: Frontend Development & Content Systems
meta: Responsive Web Design · Structured Content · Digital Publishing
work.summary: Designed and built this portfolio website from scratch using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON-driven rendering to showcase both frontend development fundamentals and structured content systems. I also have experience managing large-scale publishing environments in WordPress and Craft CMS, where clean organization and scalable workflows matter just as much as design.
work.caption: The site you're currently looking at — built from scratch to showcase responsive design, frontend fundamentals, and content-focused web development.
